import json

with open\('/home/lhy/mlc/note-lec/3_TensorIR_Tensor_Program_Abstraction_Case_Study_Action.ipynb'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Get a range of cells around the variant section \(cells 48-65\)
for i in range\(48, 66\):
    if i >= len\(nb['cells']\):
        break
    cell = nb['cells'][i]
    source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
    
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'markdown':
        print\(f"=== Markdown Cell {i} ==="\)
        print\(source\)
        print\(\)
    elif cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
        print\(f"=== Code Cell {i} ==="\)
        # Print first part of code
        lines = source.split\('\\n'\)
        for line in lines[:30]:
            print\(line\)
        if len\(lines\) > 30:
            print\(f"... \({len\(lines\)-30} more lines\)"\)
        print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate tvm-build-venv && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/python'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/ffi/python'\)

import tvm
from tvm.relax.frontend import nn

class CNNModel\(nn.Module\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.conv1 = nn.Conv2d\(in_channels=3, out_channels=16, kernel_size=3, padding=1\)
        self.relu1 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.pool1 = nn.MaxPool2d\(pool_size=2\)
        self.conv2 = nn.Conv2d\(in_channels=16, out_channels=32, kernel_size=3, padding=1\)
        self.relu2 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.pool2 = nn.MaxPool2d\(pool_size=2\)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear\(in_features=32 * 8 * 8, out_features=128\)
        self.relu3 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear\(in_features=128, out_features=10\)

    def forward\(self, x\):
        x = self.conv1\(x\)
        x = self.relu1\(x\)
        x = self.pool1\(x\)
        x = self.conv2\(x\)
        x = self.relu2\(x\)
        x = self.pool2\(x\)
        x = x.flatten\(start=1, end=3\)
        x = self.fc1\(x\)
        x = self.relu3\(x\)
        x = self.fc2\(x\)
        return x

# 创建模型并导出
model = CNNModel\(\)
origin_mod, params = model.export_tvm\({
    'forward': {'x': nn.spec.Tensor\(\(1, 3, 32, 32\), 'float32'\)}
}\)

print\('Model exported successfully!'\)
print\(f'\\nOriginal module has {len\(list\(origin_mod.functions.items\(\)\)\)} functions'\)
print\(f'\\nParameter shapes:'\)
for name, param in params.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {name}: {param.shape}'\)
")

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/python'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/ffi/python'\)

import tvm
from tvm.relax.frontend import nn

class CNNModel\(nn.Module\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.conv1 = nn.Conv2D\(in_channels=3, out_channels=16, kernel_size=3, padding=1\)
        self.relu1 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.conv2 = nn.Conv2D\(in_channels=16, out_channels=32, kernel_size=3, padding=1\)
        self.relu2 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear\(in_features=32 * 32 * 32, out_features=128\)
        self.relu3 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear\(in_features=128, out_features=10\)

    def forward\(self, x\):
        x = self.conv1\(x\)
        x = self.relu1\(x\)
        x = self.conv2\(x\)
        x = self.relu2\(x\)
        batch_size = x.shape[0]
        x = x.reshape\(\(batch_size, 32 * 32 * 32\)\)
        x = self.fc1\(x\)
        x = self.relu3\(x\)
        x = self.fc2\(x\)
        return x

# 创建模型并导出
model = CNNModel\(\)
origin_mod, params = model.export_tvm\({
    'forward': {'x': nn.spec.Tensor\(\(1, 3, 32, 32\), 'float32'\)}
}\)

print\('Model exported successfully!'\)
print\(f'\\\\nOriginal module has {len\(list\(origin_mod.functions.items\(\)\)\)} functions'\)
print\(f'\\\\nParameter shapes:'\)
for name, param in params.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {name}: {param.shape}'\)
")

        x = self.fc2\(x\)
        x = self.relu2\(x\)
        x = self.fc3\(x\)
        x = self.relu3\(x\)
        x = self.fc4\(x\)
        x = self.relu4\(x\)
        x = self.fc5\(x\)

# 创建模型并导出

origin_mod, params = model.export_tvm\({

Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate tvm-build-venv && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/python'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/ffi/python'\)

import tvm
import numpy as np
import time
from tvm import relax
from tvm.relax.frontend import nn

class MLPModel\(nn.Module\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear\(784, 512\)
        self.relu1 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear\(512, 256\)
        self.relu2 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc3 = nn.Linear\(256, 128\)
        self.relu3 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc4 = nn.Linear\(128, 64\)
        self.relu4 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc5 = nn.Linear\(64, 10\)

    def forward\(self, x\):
        x = self.fc1\(x\)
        x = self.relu1\(x\)
        x = self.fc2\(x\)
        x = self.relu2\(x\)
        x = self.fc3\(x\)
        x = self.relu3\(x\)
        x = self.fc4\(x\)
        x = self.relu4\(x\)
        x = self.fc5\(x\)
        return x

def benchmark_model\(ex, mod, params, input_shape, n_runs=10, warmup=3\):
    dev = tvm.cpu\(\)
    vm = relax.VirtualMachine\(ex, dev\)
    data_np = np.random.randn\(*input_shape\).astype\('float32'\)
    data_nd = tvm.nd.array\(data_np, dev\)
    params_nd = [tvm.nd.array\(p.data, dev\) for p in params]
    for _ in range\(warmup\):
        _ = vm['main']\(data_nd, *params_nd\)
    times = []
    dev.sync\(\)
    for _ in range\(n_runs\):
        start = time.time\(\)
        _ = vm['main']\(data_nd, *params_nd\)
        dev.sync\(\)
        times.append\(time.time\(\) - start\)
    return np.mean\(times\), np.std\(times\)

# 创建模型并导出
model = MLPModel\(\)
origin_mod, params = model.export_tvm\({
    'forward': {'x': nn.spec.Tensor\(\(1, 784\), 'float32'\)}
}\)

print\('Model exported successfully!'\)
print\(f'Original module has {len\(list\(origin_mod.functions.items\(\)\)\)} functions'\)
print\(f'Number of parameters: {len\(params\)}'\)

# 测试 Baseline
mod_baseline = origin_mod
ex_baseline = relax.build\(mod_baseline, target='llvm'\)
mean_time, std_time = benchmark_model\(ex_baseline, mod_baseline, params, \(1, 784\), n_runs=10, warmup=3\)
print\(f'\\\\nBaseline: {mean_time*1000:.3f} ± {std_time*1000:.3f} ms'\)

# 测试 Fusion
mod_fusion = tvm.ir.transform.Sequential\([
    tvm.relax.transform.LegalizeOps\(\),
    tvm.relax.transform.AnnotateTIROpPattern\(\),
    tvm.relax.transform.FuseOps\(\),
    tvm.relax.transform.FuseTIR\(\),
]\)\(origin_mod\)
ex_fusion = relax.build\(mod_fusion, target='llvm'\)
mean_time, std_time = benchmark_model\(ex_fusion, mod_fusion, params, \(1, 784\), n_runs=10, warmup=3\)
print\(f'Fusion: {mean_time*1000:.3f} ± {std_time*1000:.3f} ms'\)

print\('\\\\nTest successful!'\)
")

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/python'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/ffi/python'\)

import tvm
from tvm import IRModule, relax
from tvm.relax.frontend import nn

# 使用和 relax_transformation.ipynb 相同的简单模型
class NNModule\(nn.Module\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear\(784, 128\)
        self.relu1 = nn.ReLU\(\)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear\(128, 10\)

    def forward\(self, x\):
        x = self.fc1\(x\)
        x = self.relu1\(x\)
        x = self.fc2\(x\)
        return x

origin_mod, params = NNModule\(\).export_tvm\(
    {'forward': {'x': nn.spec.Tensor\(\('n', 784\), 'float32'\)}}
\)

print\('Model exported successfully!'\)
print\(f'\\\\nOriginal module has {len\(list\(origin_mod.functions.items\(\)\)\)} functions'\)
print\(f'\\\\nParameter shapes:'\)
for i, param in enumerate\(params\):
    print\(f'  param_{i}: {param.shape}'\)
")

import json

# List of notebooks to check
notebooks = [
    '/home/lhy/mlc/relax_transformation.ipynb',
    '/home/lhy/mlc/relax_optimization_benchmark.ipynb',
    '/home/lhy/mlc/6_Integration_with_Machine_Learning_Frameworks.ipynb',
    '/home/lhy/mlc/4_Build_End_to_End_Model.ipynb'
]

for nb_path in notebooks:
    try:
        with open\(nb_path, 'r'\) as f:
            nb = json.load\(f\)
        
        # Search for CNNModel in code cells
        for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
            if cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
                source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
                if 'CNNModel' in source and \('nn.Conv2d' in source or 'nn.Conv2D' in source\):
                    print\(f"=== Found CNNModel in {nb_path}, cell {i} ==="\)
                    # Print first 500 chars
                    print\(source[:500]\)
                    print\(\)

Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate tvm-build-venv && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/python'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/lhy/tvm/ffi/python'\)

from tvm.relax.frontend import nn
import tvm.relax.op as relax_op

# Create a test tensor
t = nn.Tensor.placeholder\(\(1, 3, 32, 32\), 'float32'\)
print\(f'Tensor type: {type\(t\)}'\)
print\(f'Tensor _expr type: {type\(t._expr\)}'\)

# Try calling max_pool2d with the underlying expr
try:
    result_expr = relax_op.nn.max_pool2d\(t._expr, pool_size=[2, 2], strides=[2, 2], padding=[0, 0]\)
    print\(f'\\\\nResult expr type: {type\(result_expr\)}'\)
    print\('Success calling with _expr!'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'\\\\nError: {e}'\)

# Check if we can wrap the result back to Tensor
print\('\\\\n=== Checking Tensor.from_expr ==='\)
if hasattr\(nn.Tensor, 'from_expr'\):
    print\('Tensor.from_expr exists'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

with open\('/home/lhy/mlc/relax_transformation.ipynb', 'r'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# 打印 notebook 结构和前几个单元格的代码
print\("=== Notebook Structure ==="\)
print\(f"Total cells: {len\(nb['cells']\)}"\)
print\(f"Cell types: {[c['cell_type'] for c in nb['cells']]}"\)

print\("\\n=== First 10 code cells ==="\)
code_count = 0
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
        code = cell['source']
        if isinstance\(code, list\):
            code = ''.join\(code\)
        print\(f"\\n--- Cell {i} ---"\)
        print\(code[:500] if len\(code\) > 500 else code\)
        code_count += 1
        if code_count >= 10:
            break
EOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/home/lhy/mlc/note-lec/5_Automatic_Program_Optimization.ipynb', 'r'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Get cells about search space and tuning
for i in range\(45, 75\):
    cell = nb['cells'][i]
    if cell['cell_type'] in ['code', 'markdown']:
        source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
        keywords = ['search space', 'tune', 'trace', 'measure', 'best', 'cost model']
        if any\(kw in source.lower\(\) for kw in keywords\):
            print\(f'\\\\n===== Cell {i} \({cell[\\"cell_type\\"]}\) ====='\)
            print\(source[:800]\)
" | head -200)
